cases.prompt: Run the generated Playwright regression test for scenario checkout.duplicate-submit and summarize the CLI failure artifacts.
cases.expected_output: A targeted Playwright CLI run with exit code, failing tests, artifact paths, and scenario mapping.
assertions: Prefers a targeted command over a broad suite.
Captures artifacts and maps failures to scenario or finding IDs when possible.

cases.prompt: Run our ARIA snapshot Playwright tests for the settings dialog baseline and capture any diff output.
cases.expected_output: A CLI execution summary for the selected ARIA snapshot tests with baseline diff artifacts and setup blockers if present.
assertions: Reports artifact paths and relevant output excerpts.
Does not use Playwright MCP browser tools.

cases.prompt: Explore the app in a browser and find UX bugs.
cases.expected_output: The skill should not trigger; browser exploration belongs to run-playwright-mcp-web-ux-test.
assertions: Does not use this skill for exploratory browser execution.
